subjects.subject_name: Department of Health and Human Services

calendar.description: Senate Health and Human Services Hearing

hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>distinguishes between an elective abortion and a medically indicated abortion;<hr><ltbullet>allows a patient to request that the patient's medical record reflect that a prior abortion was not an elective abortion;<hr><ltbullet>requires a health care provider to update a patient's medical record if requested; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
